rationale: Acting on Review 2 removes dead code (AlgPoints, unused anywhere in the diff) and tightens the verifiable overbroad import to the minimal module containing IsAlgClosed — both real, grounded, maintainer-desired cleanups under placement. Review 1's roadmap/directory/layer-split demands are not evidenced in the diff so would force unmotivated restructuring that doesn't improve (or worsens) this PR.
